acceptance_targets: [CH09-A01] PASS if a read of the revised setup at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:97, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:151 contains one unambiguous warning about Owen's divided motive and no second reiteration that he should stop before the failure starts; FAIL if the narration still tells the reader multiple times that this will go wrong before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:179 delivers the collapse.

[CH09-C01] PASS if, on a straight read of the revised action from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:141 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:205, a reader can track where Owen, Martha and the first-years, Hester, the relay third-years, the service press, and the portrait route are without rereading, and Amycus's entrance at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:229 feels spatially inevitable; FAIL if the second classroom or the extra students are still first understood only on the same beat that the disaster needs them.

[CH09-P01] PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:179, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:197, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:201, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:339, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:353 still read as funny and humiliating through action and dialogue alone, with no cluster of comparison-led punchlines doing the comic work for the scene; FAIL if those beats still depend on narrator quips that can be lifted out as jokes without the surrounding action.

[FA-006] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2585-2586 still conveys old-work interference clearly but no longer uses teeth/molars/jaw as the signal. Fail if the revised passage simply swaps in a near-synonym from the same mouth/jaw domain.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a read of the revised setup at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:97, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:151 contains one unambiguous warning about Owen's divided motive and no second reiteration that he should stop before the failure starts; FAIL if the narration still tells the reader multiple times that this will go wrong before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:179 delivers the collapse.
findings.problem: The chapter announces Owen's mistake too many times before the sabotage actually goes wrong. The repeated 'he ought to have' and Leaves-warning beats make the collapse feel pre-explained rather than discovered through scene pressure, which costs the sequence some of its humiliation and surprise at the award lens.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the anticipatory warning around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:97, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:151. Keep one clear statement that Owen is gambling with shared thresholds, then let the later activation and corridor response carry the dread; do not stack both the explanatory Leaves warning and the later double 'He should have...' beat in full.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, on a straight read of the revised action from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:141 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:205, a reader can track where Owen, Martha and the first-years, Hester, the relay third-years, the service press, and the portrait route are without rereading, and Amycus's entrance at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:229 feels spatially inevitable; FAIL if the second classroom or the extra students are still first understood only on the same beat that the disaster needs them.
findings.problem: Once the corridor cascade starts, the physical map loses clarity. The first hidden classroom, the second classroom, the service press, the portrait route, and Amycus's stair entrance are all present, but the staging is not clean enough for every beat, so the exposed third-years at line 205 arrive feeling slightly author-managed instead of fully pre-situated.
findings.rewrite_direction: Re-stage the corridor geography at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:147, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:169, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:189, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:203 by naming both classrooms or consolidating them, placing the relay students before they are exposed, and re-anchoring how the service press and portrait route relate to Amycus's stair entry at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:229.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:179, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:197, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:201, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:339, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:353 still read as funny and humiliating through action and dialogue alone, with no cluster of comparison-led punchlines doing the comic work for the scene; FAIL if those beats still depend on narrator quips that can be lifted out as jokes without the surrounding action.
findings.problem: The chapter leans too often on narrator punchlines and `as if`-style comparison machinery to package the farce. Lines like the corridor 'develop[ing] opinions,' the 'drunk cupboard' summary, the wand being 'offended by the company it kept,' and the board-piece comparison are individually clever, but in aggregate they explain or stylize beats that the physical chaos already makes funny. That repetition slightly deflates the comic commitment and flattens sentence variety.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:179, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:197, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:201, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:339, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:353, strip back the standalone quip-sentences and reduce comparison-led phrasing. Keep the humor in concrete misfire, bodily consequence, and Owen's pressured literal analysis rather than in narrator commentary about what the scene is like.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2585-2586 still conveys old-work interference clearly but no longer uses teeth/molars/jaw as the signal. Fail if the revised passage simply swaps in a near-synonym from the same mouth/jaw domain.
findings.problem: Recurring somatic-vocabulary pattern: old-work interference defaults to teeth/molars/jaw across 7 chapters, and this chapter's 'wrongness in his teeth' at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2585 is one of the weaker repeats. It narrows the book's sensory range instead of using the kitchen scene's own colder, more material pressures.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the teeth-based cue in snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2585-2586 with a different bodily or environmental register tied to this scene specifically: the burn tugging in his palm, floor-vibration through the bench, kitchen cold under wet socks, or another sensation that does not reuse teeth/molars/jaw as shorthand.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
